//: EAS Build config for the NorthKeep mobile app (Track M). Owner j_silva. Run `eas init` first to create the project and write extra.eas.projectId into app.config.ts. See the M6 notes in 07-MOBILE-LAUNCH-PLAN.md.

cli.//requireCommit: false so EAS can build from a pnpm monorepo worktree without demanding a clean commit; the repo is uploaded as-is (respecting .gitignore/.easignore).
cli.//appVersionSource: version/build number come from app.config.ts (version) rather than being managed remotely.

build.//base: Shared settings. EAS auto-detects pnpm from pnpm-lock.yaml and finds the workspace root (pnpm-workspace.yaml) to install @northkeep/core, @northkeep/sync, @northkeep/platform-mobile. node is pinned for reproducible cloud installs.

development.//: Dev client on Jay's registered iPhone (internal distribution). simulator:false targets a real device so the dev provisioning profile picks up his registered device.

preview.//: Internal ad-hoc build (no dev client) for testing a release-like binary before store submission.

production.//: Store build. autoIncrement bumps the iOS build number each submission.
